COTI-2.mechanism: Stabilizes mutant p53, restores wild-type function
references: Lindemann A, et al. (2019) COTI-2 enhances anti-tumor immunity. Oncotarget 10:2703-2716

APR-246.mechanism: Covalent modifier of mutant p53 cysteines, restores DNA binding
references: Bykov VJN, et al. (2018) Targeting mutant p53 for efficient cancer therapy. Nat Rev Cancer 18:89-102
Lambert JMR, et al. (2009) APR-246 reactivates mutant p53. Cancer Cell 15:376-388

Nutlin-3a.mechanism: MDM2 inhibitor, blocks p53-MDM2 interaction, stabilizes p53
references: Vassilev LT, et al. (2004) In vivo activation of p53 by small-molecule antagonists of MDM2. Science 303:844-848
Nutlin-3a.note: May synergize with rescue mutations by preventing degradation of rescued p53

PHI-KAN-083.mechanism: Binds Y220C cavity, stabilizes core domain
references: Boeckler FM, et al. (2008) Targeted rescue of a destabilized mutant of p53 by an in silico screened drug. PNAS 105:10360-10365
Bauer MR, et al. (2019) Targeting cavity-forming mutations in p53. Cell Chem Biol 26:1-14

PRIMA-1.mechanism: Restores mutant p53 to wild-type conformation, enhanced DNA binding
PRIMA-1.binding_site: Core domain, mechanism not fully elucidated
references: Bykov VJN, et al. (2002) Restoration of the tumor suppressor function to mutant p53 by a low-molecular-weight compound. Nat Med 8:282-288

CP-31398.mechanism: Stabilizes p53 core domain, prevents thermal denaturation
CP-31398.binding_site: Surface groove near DNA binding domain
references: Foster BA, et al. (1999) Pharmacological rescue of mutant p53 conformation and function. Science 286:2507-2510

notes.Nutlin-3a: Indirect mechanism (MDM2 inhibition), but may synergize with rescues
notes.PHI-KAN-083: Highly specific for Y220C, limited to that mutation context
notes.APR-246_PRIMA-1: APR-246 is the methylated prodrug of PRIMA-1 (same active metabolite)
